'''dhahatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonician|mnemonician]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonician|mnemonician]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhahatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhæthæth|dhæhæthæth]] || [[word:dhæhæthæj|dhæhæthæj]] || [[word:dhæhæthæsh|dhæhæthæsh]] || [[word:dhæhæthæ|dhæhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahahathath|dhahahathath]] || [[word:dhahahathaj|dhahahathaj]] || [[word:dhahahathash|dhahahathash]] || [[word:dhahahatha|dhahahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahathath|dhahathath]] || [[word:dhahathaj|dhahathaj]] || [[word:dhahathash|dhahathash]] || [[word:dhahatha|dhahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahafthath|dhahafthath]] || [[word:dhahafthaj|dhahafthaj]] || [[word:dhahafthash|dhahafthash]] || [[word:dhahafthaf|dhahafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahathatha|dhahathatha]] || [[word:dhahathaja|dhahathaja]] || [[word:dhahathasha|dhahathasha]] || [[word:dhahathaka|dhahathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahathath|dhahathath]] || [[word:dhahathaj|dhahathaj]] || [[word:dhahathash|dhahathash]] || [[word:dhahatha|dhahatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahathathal|dhahathathal]] || [[word:dhahathajal|dhahathajal]] || [[word:dhahathashal|dhahathashal]] || [[word:dhahathakal|dhahathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahathathatha|dhahathathatha]] || [[word:dhahathajaja|dhahathajaja]] || [[word:dhahathashasha|dhahathashasha]] || [[word:dhahathaka|dhahathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahathathan|dhahathathan]] || [[word:dhahathajan|dhahathajan]] || [[word:dhahathashan|dhahathashan]] || [[word:dhahathakan|dhahathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahathathaoro|dhahathathaoro]] || [[word:dhahathajaoro|dhahathajaoro]] || [[word:dhahathashaoro|dhahathashaoro]] || [[word:dhahathakaoro|dhahathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
